summary: Iteration 181: Notification Settings E2E Testing - 11/11 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend fully verified. Fixed import error in NotificationSettingsPage.jsx and added sidebar link to AdminLayout.js. All notification hooks verified working with dry-run mode.
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and payment proofs during notification hook testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification Settings feature fully wired and tested. Key findings: (1) NotificationSettingsPage.jsx had wrong import path (../../utils/api → ../../lib/api) - FIXED, (2) AdminLayout.js navItems was missing Notification Settings link - FIXED by adding to Settings section, (3) All 4 notification triggers work: customer_order_received, customer_payment_proof_received, customer_payment_verified, admin_payment_proof_submitted, (4) Checkout hook fires customer_order_received notification, (5) Payment proof hook fires customer_payment_proof_received and admin_payment_proof_submitted, (6) Payment approval hook fires customer_payment_verified, (7) Disabled triggers produce 'skipped' status in logs, (8) Dry-run mode produces 'dry_run' status in logs (no real emails sent), (9) Provider config saves correctly (sender_name, sender_email, enabled, dry_run), (10) Notification logs API returns all dispatch attempts with status, subject, recipient, timestamp.

backend_tests.get_notification_settings: PASS - Returns settings array and provider object
backend_tests.get_notification_logs: PASS - Returns log entries with proper structure
backend_tests.send_test_notification: PASS - Test dispatch works with dry_run status
backend_tests.seed_defaults_endpoint: PASS - Seed defaults initializes triggers and provider

frontend_tests.sidebar_link_exists: PASS - Link visible under Settings section
frontend_tests.triggers_tab_visible: PASS - Triggers tab with all 4 triggers
frontend_tests.provider_tab_visible: PASS - Email Provider tab with config fields
frontend_tests.test_dispatch_tab_visible: PASS - Test Dispatch tab with form
frontend_tests.all_data_testids_present: PASS - All required data-testid attributes present

fixes_applied.issue: Wrong import path for api module
Missing Notification Settings link in sidebar
fixes_applied.fix: Added { path: '/admin/notification-settings', label: 'Notification Settings', icon: Bell, moduleKey: 'settings' } to navItems

mocked_apis_list: Resend email sending is in dry-run mode (no real emails sent) - EXPECTED BEHAVIOR for testing
